summary.description: 2-3 sentence summary of what was accomplished in this session

frustrations.description: Detected pain points: repeated failures, backtracking, user corrections, tool misuse. Empty array if none.

workflow_notes.description: Observations about tool usage patterns, workflow efficiency, configuration issues. Focus on actionable insights.

is_research_subagent.description: True if this session is a subagent doing research/exploration/evaluation work

research_topic.description: If is_research_subagent is true, the topic being researched. Null otherwise.

research_tags.description: If is_research_subagent is true, searchable tags for the research. Null otherwise.
